name: Mike Biundo, National Advisor
subject: results
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Supporter,

#100DaysToVictory is off to an incredible start, and I want to introduce you to some of our Super Volunteers from this weekend!

Zachary Suazo is the Students for Rand Chapter President at the University of Nevada, Las Vegas. He signed up over 100 students on his campus, and phone-banked in our Las Vegas office over the weekend.

Kathy Peterson of Nashua, NH knocked on doors for over 5 hours on Saturday!

Callista Coulter of Des Moines, IA made hundreds of calls for Rand this weekend from our Des Moines office, and brought a friend along with her!

#100DaysToVictory is well underway! For the next 8 days, Team Rand is organizing door-knocking and phone-banking in all 50 states.

**[Supporter, can we count on you to join this massive effort](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31264096:smJF20mHN:m:1:879035888:7A8740F91921392ACE2ABD440B098A48:r)**? Visit our website to **[RSVP](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31264096:smJF20mHN:m:1:879035888:7A8740F91921392ACE2ABD440B098A48:r)** for the #100DaysToVictory Initiative.

Rand's plan for America includes:

* A 14.5% Fair and Flat Tax that eliminates corporate welfare;
* Balancing the budget in 5 years -- Rand has identified specific cuts to spending;
* Term limits to get rid of the career politicians;
* Requiring Congress to Read the Bills before voting on them;
* Making Congress live by the laws they pass;
* Following Ronald Reagan's doctrine of "peace through strength," which ensures that America has a military that is second to none, but does not use it for unnecessary foreign intervention.

Your participation is crucial to our success! Please RSVP at **[randpaul.com/100days](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31264096:smJF20mHN:m:1:879035888:7A8740F91921392ACE2ABD440B098A48:r)** and a member of our team will be in touch shortly.

Thank you for your steadfast support.

In Liberty,

Mike Biundo, National Advisor

PS: If you can't help out with the #100DaysToVictory Initiative, will you make a contribution today?

Your generous donation will help us supply our volunteers with the vital tools needed in the field to spread our message of liberty and limited government. **[Click here to make your secure contribution of $250, $100, $50, $35 or any amount that you can afford today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31264097:smJF20mHN:m:1:879035888:7A8740F91921392ACE2ABD440B098A48:r)**.

subject: The Trump Train
body:

\- October 26 2015 -
The Trump Train

| Dear Peter Willis, We are doing better than ever. We are still at the top of every national poll, ABC News and the Washington Post have Trump leading with [32% of support](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-j/) \- even if the media [won't report on it](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-t/). We are leading by huge margins in both [New Hampshire and South Carolina](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-i/), and over 70% of Republican voters agree that he is the [most electable](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-d/) candidate. This week we are busy: Tomorrow we will kickoff our week with a rally in Sioux City, Iowa - get your tickets [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-h/). On Wednesday we will be in Boulder, Colorado for the third Republican Debate at 8pm EST on CNBC. Let us know you are watching #TeamTrump16. On Thursday we are having a rally at the Nugget Casino in Sparks, Nevada. Get your tickets [here](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-k/). And finally on Saturday we will be in Virginia Beach aboard the USS Wisconsin. [Don't miss it](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-u/).
_Aerial Shot of Jacksonville Rally_
Last week was incredible. We made two stops in Florida. A passionate crowd joined me at the Trump Doral Miami on Friday. On Saturday, a [tremendous](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-o/) crowd of tens of thousands of people gathered in Jacksonville to show their support. It was incredible to see people uniting behind our vision to Make America Great Again.
_Crowd in Miami at the Trump Doral_
We will have many more campaign stops coming up. Look out for email invitations from us - and don't forget to show your support by purchasing the only official campaign merchandise at [shop.donaldjtrump.com](http://email.donaldjtrump.com/t/r-l-ztikrdt-drdiuiutjh-b/).
See you on the trail, Team Trump
---

P.S. Hosting a debate party? Let us know. Share your photos #TrumpDebateParty

| Paid for by Donald J. Trump for President, Inc.

Peter,

Dr. Carson has been preparing for Wednesday night's debate, and yesterday his wife Candy emailed you to ask if you'd like to leave him some words of encouragement.

While today's news that Dr. Carson has jumped to first place in a new national poll and expanded his Iowa lead to double digits is very encouraging, I know he would be even more inspired if he heard from you before he takes the stage.

[**Will you take a moment right now to leave him a quick note?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/31268447:sc99H0mYN:m:1:876315805:6C4AEEB139AFF9EC2444222F870E840A:r)

Peter, thank you for making our momentum possible and I hope you'll be watching the debate tomorrow night. It starts at 8pm ET on CNBC.

Onward,

Barry Bennett
Campaign Manager

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: 5 days
body:
Friend, the end of October is here and we're short of our goals. | |

---
---
|
Friend,

I won't waste your time - there are just 5 days left in October, and I need your help right now to reach our end of the month fundraising goal.

My campaign has reached out to voters in the critical early states, and we've built great momentum over these last few weeks. _**But even with all that, Friend, we're still $17,900 short of our end of month fundraising goal.**_

[**That's why I'm asking for your help - will you please chip in to guarantee we hit our critical monthly goal?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274273:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r)

| [** Donate $5 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274274:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r) | [** Donate $10 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274275:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r)
---|---
[** Donate $25 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274276:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r) | [** Donate $50 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274277:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r)
[** Donate $100 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274278:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r) | [** Donate $200 >>> **](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274279:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r)

At a time when campaigns are starting to lose direction and momentum, it's now more important than ever to send a message that my campaign has what it takes to win.

Friend, I've done what I promised you I would do when I started this campaign - I've proven to the American people that **I'm ready to be Commander-in-Chief on Day One, confront our enemies and keep America safe.**

However, I can't win without your financial support. We're close to reaching our goal, and anything that you can give will help a great deal. [**Please follow this link to donate today.**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274273:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r)

Thank you for your support.

Sincerely,

Lindsey Graham

P.S. In order to ensure we hit our critical End of Month deadline, I need your urgent financial support. [**Will you please chip in as much as you can afford by following this link?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274273:sk4jq0mpN:m:1:877327319:2F1B997D9BC16C3157F34B1B40170F1F:r) Thank you.

body:
Fellow Conservative,

"SHUT UP."

That's the message the recent "debt deal" struck by President Obama and outgoing House Speaker John Boehner is designed to send anyone who's alarmed about our nation's $18.4 TRILLION in debt.

Unless you and I can stop this insanity, this "deal" is effectively nothing more than handing big spenders in Congress a blank check to do their worst until we ring in 2017!

Is this the "fiscal conservatism" the American people voted for at the ballot box in 2014? The new ability for members of BOTH parties to keep spending like no tomorrow?

Fellow Conservative, of course not!

With your help, this is the madness I'm going to rip to shreds during tomorrow night's Republican Debate in Boulder, Colorado.

But I'm counting on your help to bust through the media blackout. **[Will you please agree to your most generous gift of $20.16 or more right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274145:sQrVq0m8N:m:1:879035888:6AAE81C324BA4C40564039B1A51EF006:r)**?

Sadly, Fellow Conservative, Republicans betraying their supporters is nothing new. It's a big reason our country is in the mess it's in. It's a big reason for the public outrage we've seen playing out in the polls.

And that anger is 100% deserved.

Our country is in too big of a mess to allow the status quo to continue any longer.

Our party can't afford a "whoops" moment where we nominate a candidate who will either lose at the ballot box or continue politics as usual if elected.

Either of those scenarios would be a complete and total failure for our nation and future generations who are counting on us to protect the freedom and prosperity that should be their birthright as American citizens.

That's why I'm counting on your support to help me bust through the media blackout.

Both the media and the political establishment know I'm the Washington Machine's worst nightmare.

While my opponents love to preen for TV and stroke their own ego, I could care less.

This isn't a TV reality show. It's not a contest to see who has the most Wall Street fat-cats, or party bigwigs backing their campaigns.

Our country needs results. It needs leaders who are willing to fight.

Not the constant stream of failures we're so used to. Not liberal appeasement.

Not the "deals" where BOTH parties in Congress agree to look the other way while their colleagues dole out our taxpayer dollars to their partisan cronies.

Our country needs tried and true limited government reforms designed to restore our constitutional freedoms.

Whether it's spending, spying or President Obama's misguided march to war in Syria, I've proven I'll stand to up members of EITHER party.

My plans to institute a 14.5% flat tax, Audit the Fed, end government spying, repeal ObamaCare, impose term limits on Congress, force Congress to read the bills, and balance the budget would revolutionize Washington, D.C.

But I can't do it alone. I'm counting on you to launch the revolution.

**[Will you please agree to you a generous gift of $20.16 ahead of tomorrow night's debate](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/31274145:sQrVq0m8N:m:1:879035888:6AAE81C324BA4C40564039B1A51EF006:r)**?

Your support can help me bust through the media blackout and bring my message straight to the American people.

name: John Lewis
subject: Why I’m helping launch African Americans for Hillary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Join me in kicking off African Americans for Hillary: | Friend --

When I set off to march across the Edmund Pettus bridge in Selma, Alabama, 50 years ago, I did so with the knowledge that I might not come back alive.

But I also knew that what we were trying to accomplish was vital to holding on to the promise of our country: that every person, regardless of race, had a say in their government.

I could never have guessed that in the year 2015, I’d be fighting essentially the same fight all over again.

While Republican candidates keep insisting that there isn’t a problem, Hillary Clinton has committed to turning the tide in favor of expanding voting rights for all Americans. **[That’s why I’m proud to be a part of this week's launch of African Americans for Hillary -- and I hope you’ll join me.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=MjM4NDY3NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNzY0NTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

I was proud to hear Hillary reaffirm her commitment to protecting voting rights in Alabama recently at the Alabama Democratic Conference Convention -- as well as to reforming our criminal justice system and advocating for funding for historically black colleges and universities.

I look forward to fighting for her the way she’s fighting for all of us. That starts right here, when you stand with her.

**African Americans for Hillary is a group of supporters making that commitment right now -- because we know how important Hillary’s campaign is to our values and our communities. Will you join me?**

| [ | [**Join African Americans for Hillary**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM4NDY3NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNzY0NTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
--- ](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=MjM4NDY3NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNzY0NTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

John Lewis

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=MjM4NDY3NzUS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjYyNzY0NTkxS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA

There are several ways to help us send a message. Thank you for your continued support!

-Rick
